data.project_name: Clean Energy for Buildings in Uzbekistan
data.bid_description: Technical Services for Structural and Seismic Safety Assessment of Public Buildings within CEBU Project in Kashkadarya Region.
data.contact_organization: Ministry of Economy and Finance, Republic of Uzbekistan
data.notice_text:
Request for Quotation

Project: Clean Energy for Buildings in Uzbekistan

IDA Credit No.: 71720-UZ

Pursuant to the Presidential Decree of the Republic of Uzbekistan dated March 30, 2023 No. PQ-106, and within the framework of the Clean Energy for Buildings in Uzbekistan (CEBU) Project financed by the World Bank, the Project Implementation Unit under the Ministry of Economy and Finance of the Republic of Uzbekistan invites eligible bidders to submit quotations for the provision of the following services:

Technical inspection of structural elements of 10 (ten) public buildings (Stage 1) in Kashkadarya Region (Procurement No. CEBU/RFQ/25).

Scope of Services:

Description of Services

Unit

Quantity

Conditions of Performance

Technical inspection of structural elements of buildings (Stage 1),  Kashkadarya Region

service

1

Republic of Uzbekistan, Kashkadarya Region.

Completion period: 45 calendar days

 

The procurement will be conducted in accordance with the Request for Quotations (RFQ) procedures specified in the World Bank Procurement Regulations for IPF Borrowers dated July 2016, revised in November 2020 and updated in September 2023 and September 2025.

To obtain the electronic version of the RFQ documents (CEBU/RFQ/25), eligible bidders shall submit a written request to the address indicated below.

Address: 1 Niyozbek Yuli Street, Yunusabad District, Tashkent, Uzbekistan

Email: procurement@cebu.uz

Quotations must be delivered to the address above (in person or by e-mail) no later than July 09, 2026, 15:00 (Tashkent time). Late submissions shall be rejected.
